items.title: New Russian-Linked GREYVIBE Targets Ukraine with AI-Powered Cyberattacks
items.summary:
A previously undocumented threat actor dubbed GREYVIBE has been attributed to ongoing and persistent attacks targeting Ukraine and Ukraine-related entities since at least August 2025.

GREYVIBE, per WithSecure, is assess...

items.title: Google Chrome adds session cookie theft protection for all users
items.summary: Google says the Chrome Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC) security feature is now generally available and is rolling out to all users to prevent account takeovers. [...]
